title: selliguea lungtauensis
intro: Selliguea lungtauensis, also known as Lungtau shield fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selliguea lungtauensis are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
